summary: Completed comprehensive testing of three new features: Salary Packaging Calculator, Property Comparison Tool, and Scenario Comparison View. All backend APIs and frontend UI components are working correctly. Fixed a syntax error in server.py that was preventing backend startup.

fixed.issue: Syntax error at line 550 - missing closing brackets and extra leftover code at lines 986-989
fixed.fix: Removed orphaned code blocks that were causing IndentationError

passed_tests: Backend API /api/analyze/salary-packaging calculates FBT and tax benefits correctly
Backend API /api/analyze/salary-packaging handles NFP employees with FBT caps
Backend API /api/analyze/salary-packaging handles empty packaging items
Backend API /api/salary-packaging/items returns available packaging items
Backend API /api/analyze/property-comparison compares single property correctly
Backend API /api/analyze/property-comparison compares multiple properties with recommendations
Backend API /api/analyze/scenario-comparison compares two scenarios with differences
Backend API /api/analyze/scenario-comparison handles scenarios with properties
Frontend Salary Packaging page loads with all form inputs
Frontend Salary Packaging Calculate button triggers API and displays results
Frontend Salary Packaging shows breakdown chart, FBT status, item analysis, and recommendations
Frontend Property Comparison page loads with property input cards
Frontend Property Comparison Compare button triggers API and displays results
Frontend Property Comparison shows comparison table, yield chart, radar chart, and portfolio summary
Frontend Scenario Comparison page loads with 3 demo scenarios
Frontend Scenario Comparison Compare button triggers API and displays results
Frontend Scenario Comparison shows best-for cards, comparison table, and tabs for charts/differences
Navigation links work for all three new pages (Salary Pkg, Compare, Compare All)
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed syntax error (missing closing brackets and orphaned code)
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - app uses dummy data from frontend context
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three new features (Salary Packaging Calculator at /salary-packaging, Property Comparison Tool at /property-comparison, and Scenario Comparison at /scenario-comparison) are fully functional. Backend APIs are working correctly. Navigation links in Layout.jsx are properly configured. The app uses dummy portfolio data from App.js context - no database seeding required.
rca_of_the_issue: The backend was not starting due to a syntax error in server.py. The error was caused by incomplete code at line 550 (missing closing brackets for a dictionary/list structure) and orphaned code at lines 986-989 that appeared to be leftover from a previous edit. Fixed by adding proper closing brackets and removing the orphaned code.
